title: Create: More Controll
description: This mod adds a better alternative to the Linked Controller
body:
THIS MOD IS IN VERY EARLY ALPHA

If you have bugs or ideas idk join my dc channel [very high quality.]

This Mod expands the Linked Network of the Create mod. 
It adds a Smart Linked Controller which has up to 1028 different Binds!
Also it adds controller support for modes like Analog which allow Redstone Signals from 0-15, perfect for controlling the speed of a Tank.
